title: Air Force general with 'UFO research' ties grabbed boots, wlalet and revolver before disappearance
description: The wife of retired Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland, who has been missing since Feb. 27, spoke out and debunked conspiracy theories about her husband's connections to UFO secrets

title: US Could Release Photos Of "Non-Human Craft" In Trump's UFO Files: Report
description: Donald Trump recently ordered the release of files related to aliens, UFOs and other information connected to the subject.

title: Wife of missing Air Force general breaks silence on his mystery 'UFO research'
description: The wife of a high-ranking retired U.S. Air Force officer who went missing nearly two weeks ago is setting the record straight following conspiracy theories.

title: Trump's UFO files 'hold clues that prove we’re not alone' in the universe
description: A former US defence chief has said imagery of an UFO which resembles nothing “we have built” will be released as Trump orders 'files related to' aliens and UFOs to be released

title: Donald Trump's Top Secret UFO Files Order: Satellite Photos of Non-Human Craft to Be Disclosed
description: Trump's order to release UFO files reignited debate on Washington's knowledge, with a former defence official citing satellite images of craft 'obviously not manmade'.
